Surprisingly they only took about half a day to install and fire blast all the membrane layers.
Highly recommend them and they’re first on my list for future roofing needs.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEKjzrs6xuLHwyQE&fid=0x0:0x57b5ab4483b01fe9"],"When":"2025-5-16"},{"Name":"Erin Moore","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXF_9-Y5UMq42CGi8UoqQpw1tSGJwxyLlLRss8V223GhpN0R8W3fw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We used Citadel Roofing in the Summer of 2025 for a commercial flat roof project.  We were super happy with the professionalism of the staff that we dealt with.  And the quality of their workmanship.  Any issues we had were dealt with in a timely manner.  They worked well with the other trades we had in at the same time.  I would recommend them to others.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tyson P","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVboXwgfPgG7PM4iq9IIXp-CFPw9DW6K-s2l66XxJ8VOrkjhZ3FyA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"John quoted us $750 to install two metal bathroom vents on the roof at approximately 22 ft high. After looking it up, the vents themselves cost about $50 each, so the majority of the cost was for labor.

A foreman completed the installation and also did a quick roof inspection (which was included with the vent installation). The work was finished in under an hour, which was efficient . Especially considering it was done on a rainy day. While I do feel for the person working in those conditions, the job was completed as promised.

The inspection was documented with photos provided afterward, which I appreciated.

I did raise a separate concern about a known leak on the shed roof and mentioned this to both John and the foreman. Unfortunately, the foreman was unable to identify it, likely because the inspection photos were taken from ground level. If I hadn’t already been aware of the issue, this leak could have been easily missed and potentially caused more damage over time.

It’s still too early for me to comment on the long-term quality of the vent installation. However, I did notice that leftover cut roofing and plywood pieces, with nails still attached, were left in the attic. This could be a safety concern for anyone working in the attic later on.

Overall, the job was completed efficiently, but due to the missed leak and the cleanup issue, I’m giving a 4 star rating.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAqVkUMSmyZLwhJ_vYQLLzM&fid=0x0:0x57b5ab4483b01fe9"],"When":"2026-1-10"},{"Name":"Allen Hassanzadeh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXtPUl2TG_euSCVHyX7kGtAePEgFteZz3MEdcq1tJpAzsRTzm5q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Citadel Company has replaced the entire roof of my house in almost 2 days.
from when I called the manager Shane to come for estimate and take a look at roof until the job was done including installing gutters did not take much time at all.
Me and my wife are super happy with the entire experience.
the crew were super nice, polite and professional and hard working guys.
We are very satisfied with The citadel and the quality of job and definitely will recommending to my fiends.
Thank you Citadel team","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICO-oHA-wE&fid=0x0:0x57b5ab4483b01fe9"],"When":"2022-6-8"},{"Name":"Lee Rebecca Michaud","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXIJ9PEOBrn4w68Cz1sPGOXdKrenAbeEkshpX2U8COIiDfMOZx0=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wow! Highly recommend.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIChh_f-wQE&fid=0x0:0x4aef9a794929fa4f"],"When":"2023-2-23"},{"Name":"Jack Nickel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXQjnQqhYbFQvkIWYDWSt3S6XOnhEN1rko4qClcyw2nuquXvGx-=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My roof was 24 years old and I knew that the cladding on my two chimney chases was in bad shape. I contacted several roofing companies but Michael at Spartan was the only one willing to do the whole job. Before making a final decision I spoke with an individual who had his roof replaced by Michael. He told me he was very happy with the work and the only problem he had was chasing Michael down to pay him. This individual also mentioned that Spartan had replaced a roof across the street and that the work had originally been contracted to Penfolds but that they had subcontracted the work to Spartan. I had also been talking to Penfolds but their quote was roughly 50% higher than Spartan's for the roof portion alone. Spartan was clearly the best choice.

I decided to go with the Landmark PRO shingles and I am glad I did. They are a heavier shingle as evidenced by the difficulty in cutting them. I was impressed with the work ethic of the crew. It was difficult to get them to take a break even though it was quite hot.

The main chimney chase was clad in channel cedar and was roughly 25 feet high. The original builder had not flashed the top of the chimney and when Michael pulled the bottom siding off it was clear that the base structure was totally rotted and that all the plywood and siding on two sides had to be replaced. He dove right in, fortified the structure and replaced the plywood and siding and ensured that it had proper flashing so the problem would not happen again. All of this was done by ladder from sloped ground - truly amazing!

I am very happy with the quality of work done and I have no reservation in recommending Michael and Spartan to my friends and family. I feel lucky to have found him.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICJqsjfPw&fid=0x0:0x4aef9a794929fa4f"],"When":"2023-6-24"}]
